name: Torex Semiconductor Ltd.
summary: Torex Semiconductor Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells integrated circuits (ICs) and active discrete components in Japan and internationally. The company offers DC/DC converters, voltage regulators and detectors, push button controllers, LED lighting drivers, load switches, power MOSFETs, temperature sensors, PLL clock generators, and transient voltage suppressors; charge pump, battery charge, hall, and oscillator ICs; and Shottky barrier, Zener, switching, bridge, and fast recovery diodes. Its products are used in consumer electronics, automotive products, industrial equipment, medical and healthcare equipment, and computers and communications products. Torex Semiconductor Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
